title: Hearthvale Wearable & Cosmetic Recipe Manifest
description: Metadata for character customization icon scaffolds. These are UI preview icons only; actual character sprites come from LimeZu Character Generator or future Hearthvale animation sheets. All generated outputs are gitignored until commit policy is set.

implementation_notes.current_system: dev_character_creator_panel.gd uses CharacterAppearance.gd model + AvatarVisual.gd rebuild
implementation_notes.sprite_source: LimeZu Character Generator (current) or future Hearthvale animation sheets
implementation_notes.icon_purpose: These recipes generate UI picker icons only, not the actual character sprites
implementation_notes.palette_variants: Each wearable type should support palette variants (e.g., shirt in red/blue/green)
implementation_notes.animation_requirements: Future character sprites need walk/idle animations in 4 directions (down/up/left/right)
implementation_notes.held_tool_attachment: Character sprites must support held tool overlay at correct hand position
implementation_notes.body_part_customization: Full customization includes: skin tone, body type, hair style, hair color, outfit, accessories
implementation_notes.limezu_intake: LimeZu Character Generator config can be exported as JSON and imported here
implementation_notes.future_direction: Eventually migrate to Hearthvale-original character generator following same visual style

notes: All generated wearable icons are local/gitignored until commit policy is set.
Character sprites themselves come from external generators (LimeZu or future Hearthvale).
These icons are for wardrobe panel UI only.
Runtime should check: specific icon → generic wearable → glyph.
See docs/character_customization.md for full customization architecture.
